This language will determine the wording of clinical reports, post-session analysis, and the patient simulator language.

Note: The Live Assistant will automatically detect the language you speak.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: We have answers
FAQ.description: Responses to the most common questions about PsicoAIssist.

security.question: Is PsicoAIssist safe for confidential patient data?
security.answer: Absolutely. PsicoAIssist complies with GDPR, LOPD-GDD, and international security standards. We use AES-256 encryption, servers in Europe, and never store unencrypted data. Each session is processed in an isolated and secure manner.

transcription.question: How does automatic transcription work?
transcription.answer: Our AI system listens to the session in real-time and transcribes automatically. It recognizes speech in Spanish (including regional accents), Catalan, and English, identifies speakers (therapist/patient), and formats text professionally. Accuracy is 95%+. Audio is processed in real-time and is NEVER recorded or stored on our servers.

customization.question: Can I customize the generated reports?
customization.answer: Yes. With the Premium plan, you can configure your "Personal Brand" settings. This allows you to add your logo, clinic name, and corporate colors, which will be automatically applied to all PDF and Word reports generated to maintain your professional image.

cancellation.question: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
cancellation.answer: You retain access to all your data for 90 days. You can export all sessions, reports, and notes at any time. If you decide to return during this period, simply log in with your old credentials to reactivate your account automatically.

limits.question: Is there a limit on the number of patients?
limits.answer: It depends on the plan. The Basic plan includes up to 25 patients. Pro and Premium plans allow unlimited patients. Premium adds advanced features like personal branding and higher AI capacity. For clinics and hospitals, we have tailored corporate plans.

support.question: Do you offer technical support?
support.answer: Yes, our support team speaks Spanish, Catalan, and English and will assist you via email. Video calls are available for onboarding, higher plans, or if the technical team deems it necessary. We also offer full documentation in these languages.

integration.question: Can I integrate PsicoAIssist with my current system?
integration.answer: We offer APIs and integrations with major clinic management systems. You can also export data to import into your existing system. Our technical team can help you with the integration.

languages.question: What languages does the system support?
languages.answer: Mainly Catalan, Spanish, and English with high accuracy. We will consider adding more languages based on user demand.

trial.question: Is there a free trial period?
trial.answer: We have a 14-day Demo Plan to try. You can test key functionalities (with usage limits) at no cost before choosing your professional plan.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
Terms.subtitle: Service agreement for mental health professionals

nature.title: 1. Nature of Service
nature.text: This application is an Artificial Intelligence-based clinical decision support tool. Its goal is to assist the professional in session management and document draft generation.
nature.warning: The tool DOES NOT replace professional judgment, nor does it perform automated diagnoses, nor dictate medical or pharmacological treatments.

responsibility.title: 2. Professional Responsibility
responsibility.text: The user (accredited mental health professional) acknowledges and accepts that:

list.1: They are solely responsible for verifying AI-generated information before using it or including it in clinical records.
list.2: They are responsible for obtaining informed consent from patients for the use of session support tools.
list.3: They maintain final responsibility for any clinical decision made regarding their patients.

ownership.title: 3. Data Ownership
ownership.text: All clinical data, session notes, and patient information entered into the platform are the exclusive property of the professional and/or the patient, as applicable. The platform acts as a data processor, limited to safeguarding and processing information according to user instructions.

usage.title: 4. Acceptable Use
usage.text: The user commits to ethical use of the platform, respecting the profession's Code of Ethics and current regulations. Using the system for illicit, discriminatory purposes or those that violate human dignity is prohibited.

ethics.title: 5. Ethical and Professional Limits
ethics.intro: Platform use is subject to the following unbreakable ethical limits, aligned with current deontological regulations:

diagnosis.title: AUTOMATED DIAGNOSIS PROHIBITION
diagnosis.text: Using AI outputs as definitive clinical diagnoses is strictly prohibited. AI is a guidance support tool; diagnosis is an act exclusive to the human professional.

emergency.title: DUTY OF EMERGENCY
emergency.text: The application IS NOT an emergency or crisis intervention device. In situations of imminent risk of suicide or harm to others, the professional must act according to conventional emergency protocols, without relying on tool processing.

transparency.title: TRANSPARENCY WITH THE PATIENT
transparency.text: It is the professional's ethical obligation to inform the patient about the use of technological support tools during the session and guarantee that this use does not interfere with the quality of the therapeutic alliance.

fairUse.title: 6. Fair Use Policy
fairUse.text: To ensure system stability and service quality for all users, plans with 'Unlimited' features are subject to the following monthly security caps:
fairUse.warning: * Use exceeding these limits is considered abusive and may result in temporary account suspension or support contact.

plans.title: 7. Subscription Plans and Features
plans.intro: Below are the available plans and their contractual features. Prices may be subject to applicable taxes.
plans.policy: Monthly Reset Policy: All quotas included in plans (transcription minutes, simulator cases, etc.) reset automatically at the start of each billing cycle. Unused resources during the current month do not roll over to the next month.

clinics.title: For Health Centers, Universities and Hospitals

agenda.title: Agenda Manager
agenda.desc: Additional administrative user for appointment management. No access to clinical records.

aiPack.title: AI Minutes Pack
aiPack.desc: 500 additional AI processing minutes. One-time payment, do not expire while subscription is active.

onboarding.title: Assisted Onboarding
onboarding.desc: 45 min session with a specialist for initial setup and data import.

simPack.title: Simulator Pack
simPack.desc: Pack of 10 additional interactive clinical cases for practice. Includes detailed AI feedback.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: The platform is not responsible for possible errors in transcription or AI suggestions, as it is a probabilistic technology. Human verification is indispensable in all cases.

AIJustification.title: Legal and Regulatory Documentation
AIJustification.subtitle: AI Act Ready • GDPR Compliant • Professional Ethics

General.title: AI Support System for Mental Health Guidance

nature.title: Nature of the System
nature.text: The artificial intelligence system acts exclusively as a support tool for professionals, without the capacity for diagnosis, prescription, or automated clinical decision-making.

classification.title: Classification under the AI Act
classification.text: The system falls within high-risk AI systems as support for decision-making, but does not make automated decisions, in accordance with Articles 14 and 22 of the GDPR and the European AI Act framework.

limitations.title: Functional Limitation
list: Does not suggest instruments in real-time.
Only shows options at the end of the session.
Explicitly limits the number of themes and instruments.

traceability.title: Traceability and Auditability
traceability.text: Each instrument suggestion includes a descriptive justification (why_this_test_was_suggested) based on:
traceability.footer: There is no opaque decision or non-explainable model.

minors.title: Protection of Minors
minors.intro: When the system is used with minors:
list: Developmental and non-diagnostic language is used.
The final decision always rests with the responsible adult and the professional.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
items: Ethical principles of psychological testing usage

Compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance Document
Compliance.subtitle: Artificial intelligence system for professional report generation

object.title: Purpose of the Document
object.text1: This document aims to describe and accredit the regulatory, technical, and ethical compliance of the artificial intelligence system (hereinafter, the system) used exclusively as a tool to support the drafting of professional reports in the field of mental health.
object.text2: The types of reports covered by the system are:
object.alert: The system does not adopt automated decisions, does not issue clinical diagnoses, does not establish causalities nor substitute professional judgment, and operates under mandatory human supervision in all phases.

framework.title: Applicable Regulatory Framework
framework.intro: The design, development, and use of the system comply with the following regulatory framework:
list: Regulation (EU) 2016/679, of April 27, 2016 (General Data Protection Regulation – GDPR).
Professional and deontological regulations applicable to professional practice.
Ethical principles regarding the use of technological tools in the preparation of professional reports.

description.title: General System Description
description.text: The system is an AI-based drafting assistance tool that generates structured report drafts from:
list1: Clinical notes written by the professional.
Explicit parameters defined by the professional (report type, structure, linguistic profile).
featuresList: Total absence of autonomous decision-making capacity.
Explicit prohibition of generating unfounded content.

risk.title: Risk Classification under the AI Act
risk.text: Given the nature of the generated reports and their possible impact on the rights and interests of natural persons, the system is classified as a high-risk AI system under the European Artificial Intelligence Act.
risk.intro: Consequently, the system incorporates the guarantees required for this category, including:
list: Transparency in the use of AI.
Complete traceability of the generation process.
Technical measures to prevent errors, biases, and misuse.
Reinforced controls for especially sensitive uses (legal-forensic reports).

sub1.title: 5.1. Mandatory Supervision
sub1.text: All reports generated with system support mandatorily require:
list: Full review of content by a qualified professional.
Express validation before any external use or communication to third parties.
Explicit confirmation of human review before marking a report as finalized.
sub1.note: In the case of legal-forensic reports, a reinforced supervision mode applies, preventing report finalization without specific human validation.

sub2.title: 5.2. Responsibility
sub2.text1: Responsibility for the final content of the report lies exclusively with the professional who reviews, validates, and signs it.
sub2.text2: The system cannot be considered author, co-author, or responsible for the content of any report.

sub1.title: 6.1. Legal Basis
list: Informed, explicit, and verifiable consent of the data subject.
Compliance with professional and legal obligations.

sub2.title: 6.2. Minimization
list: The system does not infer additional data.

sub3.title: 6.3. Treatment of Special Data
list: Reinforced technical security measures (encryption, access control).
Data not used to train AI models.

sub4.title: 6.4. Exercise of Rights
sub4.text: The exercise of rights of access, rectification, erasure, limitation of processing, and information on the use of AI is guaranteed.

transparency.title: Transparency and Information to Data Subjects
transparency.text: All generated reports incorporate an explicit statement indicating:
list: That they have been drafted with the support of an AI tool.
That the content is not the result of an automated decision.
That the report has been reviewed and validated by a responsible professional.

ethics.title: Applied Ethical Principles
ethics.text: The design and use of the system respects the following principles:
avoidList: Predictions of future conduct or evolution.

forensic.title: Specific Controls for Legal-Forensic Reports
forensic.text: Legal-forensic reports are subject to a reinforced security mode (Safe Forensic Mode) which includes:
list: Technical prohibition of categorical or causal affirmations.
Obligation to explicitly differentiate between observed facts and patient statements.
Automated content validations before allowing finalization.
Express confirmation of reinforced human review.

traceability_control.title: Traceability and Control
traceability_control.text: The system maintains auditable internal records regarding:
list: Date and time of generation of each draft.
System version and AI model utilized.

limitations.title: System Limitations
list: The system does not substitute professional evaluation or judgment.
Generated reports have guidance character until validated.
Use outside professional context or without human supervision constitutes misuse.

declaration.title: Final Declaration of Compliance
declaration.text: The artificial intelligence system described in this document has been designed and implemented in accordance with applicable legal, technical, and ethical requirements under current European regulations, and incorporates specific guarantees for responsible, transparent, traceable use under effective human control.

sections.footer: *Document prepared for purposes of justifying regulatory compliance before competent authorities, internal or external audits, and inspection processes.*

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.subtitle: Information about the use of cookies and similar technologies

what.title: 1. What are cookies?
what.text: A cookie is a small text file that is stored in your browser when you visit almost any webpage. Its utility is for the web to be able to remember your visit when you browse that page again.

used.title: 2. Cookies used by this website
used.text: This application exclusively uses technical and session cookies necessary for the operation of the service.

auth.title: Authentication Cookies
auth.text: Used to identify the user once logged in, allowing access to private areas and ensuring the session remains active securely.

pref.title: Preference Cookies
pref.text: Store user interface preferences (such as language or font size) to personalize your experience.

sec.title: Security Cookies
sec.text: Help prevent security attacks and protect user data against unauthorized access.

third.title: 3. Third-party Cookies
third.text: Currently, we do not use advertising or tracking cookies from third parties (such as Google Analytics or Facebook Pixel) within the private area of the application. The privacy of the professional and patient is a priority.

deactivate.title: 4. How to deactivate cookies?
deactivate.text: You can restrict, block, or delete browser cookies at any time. Consult your browser's help to know how to do it. Please note that deactivating technical cookies could prevent the correct functioning of the application.

GDPR.title: Privacy Policy and GDPR
GDPR.subtitle: Commitment to the protection of personal and sensitive data

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller is PsicoAIssist. We are committed to treating patient and professional data with maximum confidentiality, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sub1.title: 2.1 Personal Data
sub1.text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

sub2.title: 2.2 Clinical Data
sub2.text: Patient clinical data is processed under strict security measures:

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: We use the collected information to:
list: Provide transcription and AI services (generate reports, analysis).
Manage clinical history and professional agenda.
Provide technical support and improve our algorithms (with anonymized data).
purpose.note: We do not use data for advertising purposes nor do we cede it to third parties without explicit consent, except for legal obligation or service providers under confidentiality agreement.

legal.title: 4. Legal Basis of Processing
legal.text: We process data under the following GDPR legal bases:
list: Legal compliance: For regulatory and fiscal obligations.

security.title: 5. Minimization and Security (Data Protection)
list: Minimization: Audio transcripts are processed ephemerally whenever possible.
Encryption: AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. Keys rotated periodically.
Access Control: Two-factor authentication, role-based access, and complete audit logs.
security.alertText: Despite security measures, we remind you that no system is invulnerable. The use of artificial intelligence implies data processing on secure servers. We guarantee that patient data is not used for training public models.

sharing.title: 6. Sharing Information
sharing.text: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except:
list: Necessary service providers (under strict confidentiality agreements).

rights.title: 7. Rights of Data Subjects
rights.text: Both professionals and patients have the right to:
list: Erasure: Request deletion of their data (Right to be forgotten).
Portability: Receive their data in structured format.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
list: Account data: As long as the account remains active. In case of cancellation request, data will be kept blocked for 30 days (grace period) before being permanently anonymized.
Clinical data: According to applicable medical regulations.

transfers.title: 9. International Transfers
transfers.text: All data is processed and stored on servers located within the European Union. We do not perform international data transfers outside the European Economic Area (EEA) without adequate GDPR guarantees.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.text: To exercise your rights or make privacy inquiries:

authority.title: 11. Control Authority
authority.text: You have the right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority if you consider that the processing of your personal data does not comply with current regulations.

Cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
Cancel.message: No charges have been processed. Your subscription has not been activated.

reasons.title: Possible reasons:
reasons.paymentError: There was an error with your payment method

help.title: Need help?
help.message: If you have payment issues or need assistance, we're here to help.

Success.title: Payment Completed!
Success.message: Thank you for subscribing to the {plan} plan. Your account has been successfully activated.

demo.title: Demo Mode
demo.message: You are viewing a payment process simulation.

Hero.badge: For Health Centers, Universities, and Hospitals
Hero.title:
Standardize Clinical Excellence
in your Organization
Hero.description: The comprehensive platform to manage teams, audit care quality, and train your new professionals with AI.

Features.mainDescription: Stop managing your clinic with spreadsheets and disconnected tools. Centralize operations, training, and quality control.
Features.trainingDesc: New hires? Have them practice with our Unlimited Clinical Simulator before seeing real patients. Expose them to complex cases (suicide, grief, BPD) in a safe environment.
Features.complianceDesc: Detailed log of access to medical records. Granular roles (Administrator, Supervisor, Professional, Agenda Manager) to comply with the strictest GDPR regulations.
Features.apiDesc: Connect PsicoAIssist with your hospital management software (SAP, Salesforce Health, etc.). Synchronize patients and schedules automatically.

Agenda.title: The "Agenda Manager" Role:
Agenda.subtitle: Organization without compromising privacy
Agenda.description: We know that coordination is key in a clinic, but confidentiality is sacred. That's why we created a unique role for your administrative staff.
Agenda.accessDesc: Your managers can handle appointments, payments, and schedules for the entire team without accessing the content of clinical notes or confidential reports.
Agenda.groupsDesc: Multiple locations? Child and Adult teams? Create "Groups" so each manager can filter and view only relevant schedules with a single click.

Simulator.title: The "Flight Simulator" for Psychologists
Simulator.description: The only platform that includes a 24/7 active AI trainer. Your professionals can practice difficult interventions and receive immediate feedback on empathy, treatment adherence, and CBT techniques.
Simulator.feature1: Create custom scenarios (e.g., Resistance to change)
Simulator.feature2: Automatic feedback based on clinical guidelines
Simulator.feature3: No cost per minute (Flat Training Rate)

CTA.title: Ready to scale your clinic?
CTA.description: Let's talk about your specific needs. We offer custom plans, assisted data migration, and on-site training.

validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.consentDataRequired: You must obtain consent for data processing.
validation.consentAIRequired: You must inform about the use of AI systems.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: Confidential patient data. This information will be encrypted.

communication.title: Communication Preferences
communication.description: Configure how appointment reminders will be sent.

consent.title: Informed Consent (GDPR)
consent.description: It is mandatory to register the patient's explicit consent before processing their data.

fields.emailRemindersDesc: Send automatic reminders to the registered email address.
fields.consentDataDesc: The patient authorizes the storage and processing of their personal and health data on the platform.
fields.consentAIDesc: The patient has been informed that Artificial Intelligence systems will be used to support the session.

error.generic: An error occurred while saving the client.

New.title: New Patient
New.subtitle: Enter basic information to open a new file.

success.title: Client created successfully
success.description: The new patient file has been created.

success.title: Client updated
success.description: Patient information has been saved successfully.

privateNotes.title: Private Notes
privateNotes.empty: No notes registered for this patient.

Blog.title: Blog and Resources
Blog.subtitle: Practical tips on digitalization, AI ethics, and efficient clinic management.

Docs.title: Documentation Center
Docs.description: Everything you need to know to get the most out of PsicoAIssist. Detailed guides, quick tutorials, and complete references.

manual.title: User Manual
manual.description: Complete documentation on all platform functionalities. Learn about roles, patient management, billing, and AI analysis.

quickGuide.title: Quick Guide
quickGuide.description: In a hurry? Find out how to perform common tasks in less than a minute. Create appointments, add patients, and synchronize calendars.

tutorials.title: Video Tutorials
tutorials.description: Step-by-step visual guides. From initial setup to advanced use of AI statistics.

reference.title: Reference and Glossary
reference.description: Definitions of AI metrics, user roles, and technical documentation for integrations (API).

contact.text: Can't find what you're looking for?

Manual.title: User Manual
Manual.subtitle: Complete PsicoAIssist Guide: From initial setup to advanced AI usage and reporting.

intro.title: 1. Introduction to PsicoAIssist
intro.text: Welcome to PsicoAIssist, the comprehensive platform designed to modernize and simplify psychology practice management. Our mission is to allow professionals to focus on what really matters: their patients, while technology handles administration and provides AI-based clinical support tools.

capabilities.title: What can you do with PsicoAIssist?

list.0: Automated Transcription: Convert your session audio to text in multiple languages.
list.1: Emotional Analysis: Detect sentiment patterns and recurring themes over time.
list.2: Report Generation: Create evolution and discharge reports automatically based on session history.
list.3: Clinical Assistant: Receive objective intervention suggestions and risk alerts.

list.0: Secure and centralized digital records.
list.1: Session history, clinical progression, and active risk levels.
list.2: Storage of documents, private notes, and signed informed consents.

list.0: Management of individual, couple, and group appointments.
list.1: Two-way synchronization with Google Calendar.
list.2: Agenda blocks, buffers between sessions, and rate configuration.

list.0: Clinical Simulator: Practice complex cases with specialized virtual patient AI.
list.1: Video Conferencing: Native encrypted video platform for remote sessions.
list.2: Personal Branding: Add your logo and colors to generated reports.

roles.title: 2. User Roles
roles.text: The platform assigns different permissions depending on the user's role:

professional.title: Professional (Psychologist/Psychiatrist)
professional.desc: The main user who treats patients.

list.0: Manages their own agenda, rates, and patients.
list.1: Conducts sessions and accesses all AI tools, transcriptions, and notes.
list.2: Generates and signs clinical reports.

manager.title: Agenda Manager (Secretary/Administration)
manager.desc: Administrative role for appointment management, ideal for clinics.

list.0: Manages calendars of one or more assigned professionals.
list.1: Creates patient profiles and schedules appointments, but CANNOT access clinical notes or transcriptions.
list.2: Can group professionals to view combined agendas and find available slots.

admin.title: Administrator (Clinic Manager)
admin.desc: Maximum authority role in group accounts.

list.0: Manages billing, creates users, and assigns roles.
list.1: Accesses global clinic statistics and configures integrations via API.

plans.title: 3. Plans & Subscriptions
plans.text: PsicoAIssist operates on a flexible subscription model. You can view or improve your plan at any time from Profile > Subscription.
plans.languages: 🌍 Multilingual Support: The AI understands and processes sessions in over 50 languages (Catalan, Spanish, English, etc.), generating reports and analysis in the platform's configured language.

resetPolicy.title: ⚠️ Monthly Reset Policy
resetPolicy.text: Included resources (AI minutes, simulator cases) reset on the 1st of each calendar month. Unused resources do NOT roll over to the next month.
resetPolicy.note: Exception: Separately purchased 'Extra Packs' do not expire until exhausted.

demo.title: Demo
demo.description: Initial free trial to discover the platform.
demo.features: Limited basic features to explore the interface without cost.

basic.title: Basic Plan
basic.description: Perfect for independent psychologists just starting.
basic.features: Up to 25 patients, 10h basic transcription, general agenda.
basic.limitations: No Generative AI, no Clinical Simulator, no integration.

pro.title: Pro Plan
pro.description: The most popular option for professional practice.
pro.features: Unlimited patients, 15h (900 min) Full AI Analysis, Google Calendar Sync, 5 Simulator cases/month, PDF Export.

premium.title: Premium Plan
premium.features: Everything in Pro plus 50h (3,000 min) AI, Unlimited Simulator, Custom Branding (Logo in reports), Unlimited Storage.

clinics.title: Clinics / Institutions Plan
clinics.description: For Health Centers, Universities, and Hospitals.
clinics.features: Unlimited users, Corporate AI pool, Agenda Managers, Advanced Compliance, API Access, Unified Billing.

agenda.title: Agenda Manager Seat
agenda.description: Add an administrative user seat to your plan to delegate appointment management.

minutes.title: AI Minutes Pack
minutes.description: Purchasable expansion if you exhaust your monthly AI minute allocation before renewal.

simulator.title: Simulator Cases Pack
simulator.description: Expansion of additional training cases for the clinical simulator.

onboarding.title: Personalized Onboarding
onboarding.description: Dedicated 45-minute session with our team to configure your account, branding, and workflows.

fairUse.title: Fair Use Policy
fairUse.text: Resource usage is subject to reasonable limits to ensure service stability. Account sharing is strictly prohibited and monitored.
fairUse.warning: Non-compliance may result in immediate account suspension.

access.title: Access
access.text: Access from any modern browser. We strongly recommend Chrome for the best stability during audio recording and video calls.

config.title: Initial Configuration
config.text: Before starting your first session, we recommend doing the following:

list.0: Go to Settings > Agenda to configure your weekly availability, session duration, and rate.
list.1: If you wish to use your personal calendar, go to Settings > Preferences and enable Google Calendar Sync.
list.2: Go to Clients > Add Patient to create your first clinical file and record their consent.

dashboard.title: 5. Main Dashboard
dashboard.text: Your command center. From the 'Widget Library' button you can completely customize what information you want to see.

professional.title: Professional View
professional.text: The dashboard offers up to 16 configurable widgets to track your clinical activity and agenda in real time.

list.0: Agenda and Quick Actions: 'Upcoming Sessions' (with joint button), 'Calendar Tool', 'New Session' shortcut.
list.1: AI Clinical Metrics: 'Sentiment Trend' (wellness chart), 'Recurring Themes' map, and severe 'Risk Alerts'.
list.2: Business Analytics: 'Estimated Revenue', 'Occupancy Rate', 'Patient Demographics' (Age, Gender, Source).
list.3: Activity Control: 'Recent Activity', 'Attendance Status' (Completed vs Cancelled), and 'Plan Limits'.

professional.note: * AI widget data updates automatically after finishing and processing a session with audio.

manager.title: Manager View
manager.text: Managers access a simplified dashboard focusing on the unified agenda of all professionals they manage, facilitating appointment coordination.

patients.title: Patient Management
patients.text: Complete clinical files. From their profile you can view basic data, emergency contacts, session history with statuses, upload external documents, manage private notes, and assign a priority/risk level. You can also temporarily 'Archive' inactive patients without deleting their data.

sessions.title: Sessions & Transcription
sessions.text: The core of the platform. You can conduct in-person sessions (recording audio) or remote (video conference).

step1.title: Create:
step1.text: From the agenda or the patient's file. Indicate modality (in-person/online) and participants.

step2.title: During:
step2.text: Access the session and click "Record" or "Start Video". If the patient is a minor, enable "Minor Mode".

list.0: Audio is captured locally in your browser and transmitted securely.
list.1: You can take quick private notes simultaneously.

step3.title: Finish & Process:
step3.text:
Crucial step: Press "Finish Session". The system will formalize attendance and send the audio for AI processing.
Processing time is roughly 30% of the session length.
step3.note: A notification will alert you when to review the results. You can process multiple sessions simultaneously.

step4.title: Review:
step4.text: When processed, the session details update with new tabs:

list.0: Transcription: Verbatim text with identified speakers.
list.1: AI Analysis: Facts, emotions, topics, and suggestions.
list.2: Clinical Notes: Where you can validate and expand the AI draft.

sessions.cancelNote: Sessions marked as 'Cancelled' or 'No Show' do not consume AI resources and are excluded from clinical statistics.

video.title: Video Conferencing
video.text: Secure native system compliant with European health data transfer regulations.

step1.title: Send Link:
step1.text: When creating an online session, use 'Send Email Invitation' to notify the patient.

step2.title: Waiting Room:
step2.text: The patient remains in a virtual room until you explicitly admit them.

step3.title: Integrated Recording:
step3.text: Once connected, start recording to capture audio exactly as in an in-person session.

reports.title: Clinical Reports Generation
reports.text: The platform analyzes a patient's entire session history to generate comprehensive clinical documents automatically.

list.0: Evolution Report: Summary of progress over a specific period.
list.1: Discharge Report: Final document consolidating diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up recommendations.
list.2: School/Work Justification: Brief attendance certificate.
list.3: Referral Report: Structured objective data for another specialist.
list.4: Custom Request (Prompt): Ask the AI for a specific summary format.

list.0: Go to Reports > New Report.
list.1: Select the patient and the sessions to include.
list.2: Choose the report type; the AI drafts the initial document.
list.3: Edit, format, and add your manual conclusions.
list.4: Click 'Finish' to lock the document and download it in PDF or Word.

statistics.title: Advanced Statistics
statistics.text: General section compiling grouped data from your entire practice. It allows you to understand clinical and financial trends across all your patients.

list.0: Billing: Estimated income analysis based on session duration, configured rates, and attendance status.
list.1: Demographics: Breakdown of your patient base by age, gender, and source constraint.
list.2: Themes and Sentiment: Word clouds and wellness evolution curves aggregating all transcribed semantic data.
list.3: Activity: Busy hours map, cancellation ratios, and session distribution.

ai.title: AI Clinical Analysis
ai.text: Each processed session includes a rigorous multi-factor analysis:

summary.title: Factual Details:
summary.text: Chronological summary of events and facts discussed.

emotional.title: Emotional Profiling:
emotional.text: Detection of implicit feelings, affect flattening, or emotional spikes.

themes.title: Thematic Structuring:
themes.text: Categorization of the discourse (e.g., 'Work Stress', 'Childhood Trauma').

tests.title: Tests & Tools:
tests.text: Academic recommendation of tests (BDI, STAI...) or concrete CBT exercises.

risks.title: Critical Risk Alerts:
risks.text: Red flag detection for self-harm, aggression, or abuse. Warning: REQUIRES HUMAN VALIDATION.

simulator.title: Clinical Simulator (Roleplay)
simulator.text: Training environment simulating dialogue with complex patients. Select a profile (e.g., 'Borderline Personality', 'Complicated Grief') and interact via text or voice.

list.0: Sessions have a maximum predefined duration (normally 45m).
list.1: The AI evaluates your empathy, intervention strategy, and active listening at the end.
list.2: These cases do NOT mix with your real statistics or billing.

profile.title: 7. Profile & Subscription
profile.text: From 'Profile' you manage your professional identity, subscription, and limits.

subscription.title: Subscription and Onboarding
subscription.text: Check your current plan status, next billing cycle, and remaining resource percentage.

list.0: Stripe Portal: Through the billing manage button, you securely access Stripe to download invoices or change payment methods.
list.1: Change Plan / Cancel: You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel the subscription renewal automatically.

packs.title: Extra Packs
packs.text: Balance of packs purchased outside the monthly quota.

list.0: Extra AI minutes.
list.1: Extra simulator sessions.
list.2: Packs remain available until fully consumed, regardless of month end.

security.title: Account Details
security.text: Change access passwords, update your professional biography, or configure two-factor authentication.

export.title: 8. Privacy & Data Export
export.text: Under the GDPR right to portability, you can extract your information from the 'Settings > Privacy' section at any time.

list.0: Patients CSV: Directory of names, emails, phones, and status.
list.1: Sessions CSV: Log of all dates, durations, and attendance marking.

list.0: All Reports: Downloads a ZIP file containing every finalized clinical report in PDF format.
list.1: Used for clinical history transfers or local archiving.

settings.title: 9. Settings

list.0: Weekly Schedule: Mark your working days and regular time slots.
list.1: Buffer: Automatic rest time added between consecutive sessions.
list.2: Rate: Default price per session used globally for revenue statistics.
list.3: Blocks: Create single or recurring blocks for vacations or personal arrangements.

google.title: Google Calendar Integration
google.text: OAuth2 connector to synchronize events bidirectionally.

list.0: PsicoAIssist sessions export to Google as events.
list.1: Google events import as opaque busy blocks preventing double booking.

list.0: Upload professional or clinic Logo.
list.1: Configure official Trade Name.
list.2: Select main Color Palette.

settings.note: These elements will header all generated PDF reports and modify the platform's color scheme.

managers.title: Agenda Managers
managers.text: If your plan allows it, invite secretaries from this section by assigning them the 'Manager' role to control your calendar.

list.0: Configure email alerts for successful processing or new patients.
list.1: Manage in-app popups.

account.title: Danger Zone: Account Deletion
account.text: Permanent and irreversible account deletion request.

list.0: Executes an immediate soft-delete cutting off all access and canceling subscriptions.
list.1: Initiates a formal 30-day legal grace period holding data blocked but recoverable.
list.2: Irreversible Permanent Deletion (Day 31): Complete anonymization and irreversible deletion of all contact and clinical data complying with GDPR.

QuickGuide.title: Quick Guide
QuickGuide.subtitle: Frequent actions in less than a minute. Straight to the point.

sync.title: Google Calendar Sync
sync.note: *Tip: This allows your PsicoAIssist appointments to appear on your calendar.

list.0: Change Plan: In Profile > Subscription > Upgrade Plan. Compare Basic, Pro, and Premium plans.
list.1: Vacation: In Settings > Agenda > Blocks. Use "Block Full Day" to mark non-working days without deleting sessions.
list.2: Rate: Configure your hourly rate in Settings > Agenda so estimated revenue calculates correctly.

list.0: Full Notes: AI needs context. Write post-session notes to improve "Recurring Themes" and "Wellness Trend".
list.1: Mark Attendance: Use "Completed" or "Cancelled". "Pending" appointments don't count in stats or billing.
list.2: Reports: Generate Evolution or Discharge reports from Reports > New Report. The AI generates a draft based on sessions.
list.3: Export Data: From Settings > Privacy download all your data in CSV or all reports in a PDF ZIP.

list.0: Groups: Create groups (e.g. "Afternoons") if managing many doctors for quick filtering and combined agendas.
list.1: Unified View: Selecting a group shows a combined agenda ideal for finding available gaps.

google.title: "I don't see my Google appointments"
google.text: Ensure the "Import events" switch is on in Settings > Agenda and you granted all requested permissions on the Google screen.

dashboard.title: "Dashboard is empty"
dashboard.text: If you just registered, this is normal. Create your first patient and session to start seeing data. AI widgets need completed notes.

reports.title: "Report stays as draft"
reports.text: Make sure to click 'Finish' to complete the report. Once completed, you can download it as PDF or Word.

ai.title: "No AI analysis generated"
ai.text: Check that you pressed the 'Record' button during the session. AI only analyzes captured audio. Also verify your AI minutes in Profile > Subscription > Limits.

Tutorials.title: Video Tutorials
Tutorials.subtitle: Learn by watching. Visual guides to master the platform.

0.title: How to create your first session
0.description: Learn step-by-step how to schedule an appointment and link it to a patient.

1.title: Interpreting AI Dashboard
1.description: Discover what wellness metrics and recurring themes mean.

2.title: Configuring Google Calendar
2.description: Sync your personal agenda with the platform to avoid conflicts.

3.title: Management for Secretaries (Agenda Managers)
3.description: How to manage multiple doctors and create professional groups.

callToAction.title: Looking for something specific?
callToAction.text: We are creating new tutorials every week. If you need help with something specific, contact us.

Tutorials.comingSoon: Coming Soon... We are recording new content.

disclaimer.title: Important Note
disclaimer.text: The videos shown are simulations with fictional actors. No real patient data is used in these examples.

Reference.title: Glossary & Reference
Reference.subtitle: Key definitions and technical details for advanced users and developers.

manager.title: Agenda Manager
manager.text: Administrative role with permissions to manage calendars and appointments of other professionals ("Managed Professionals"), create groups, and view patient lists. No access to sensitive clinical data.

themes.title: Recurring Themes (AI)
themes.text: Natural language processing algorithm that analyzes anonymized session notes to extract thematic patterns (e.g., "Work anxiety", "Family conflict"). Visible in Dashboard and Statistics.

sentiment.title: Wellness Trend (Sentiment Analysis)
sentiment.text: Wellness metric calculated by analyzing the emotional tone of clinical notes and transcriptions. Presented as a trend chart (0-100) over time, visible in Dashboard and Statistics.

transcription.title: AI Transcription
transcription.text: Automatic process of converting audio recorded during a session to text. Supports over 50 languages. Consumes subscription plan minutes. Appears in the 'Transcription (AI)' section of each session.

extraPack.title: Extra Pack
extraPack.text: Purchasable add-on to add additional resources (AI minutes or simulator cases) to your plan. Unlike base plan resources, extra packs do not expire at month end - they are consumed until exhausted.

simulator.title: Clinical Simulator
simulator.text: Training tool generating virtual patients with specific profiles and pathologies. Practice therapeutic techniques safely. 45 min session limit. Availability depends on plan (Pro: 5/mo, Premium: unlimited).

reportEvolution.title: Evolution Report
reportEvolution.text: Clinical document summarizing patient progress over multiple sessions. Generated automatically by AI and manually editable. Downloadable as PDF and Word.

reportDischarge.title: Discharge Report
reportDischarge.text: Formal treatment completion document with therapeutic process summary and maintenance recommendations. Downloadable as PDF and Word.

branding.title: Branding (Personal Brand)
branding.text: Premium plan exclusive allowing customization of PDF and Word reports with the professional's logo, clinic name, and corporate colors.

buffer.title: Session Buffer
buffer.text: Automatic rest time between consecutive appointments (e.g., 10 mins) configurable in Settings > Agenda. Prevents overlaps and allows transition between patients.

blocks.title: Agenda Blocks
blocks.text: System to mark full days (vacations, holidays) or partial time slots (e.g., lunch break) as unavailable. Managed from Settings > Agenda > Blocks.

consent.title: Informed Consent
consent.text: Mandatory popup when starting a session confirming the patient authorizes AI usage and, if applicable, minority status. Legal requirement for data processing.

api.title: API Reference (Basic)
api.text: PsicoAIssist offers a RESTful API for custom integrations (available in Clinics/Institutions plans). To obtain full access to API documentation (Swagger), contact support.

Metadata.description: Empower your psychological practice with responsible AI. Automated transcription, professional reports, and intelligent analysis. GDPR compliant.
Metadata.keywords: psychologist, AI, transcription, sessions, GDPR, artificial intelligence, clinical reports, psychological practice, virtual assistant, automated transcription, session analysis, psychology software

SessionDetail.title: Session Details
SessionDetail.transcriptionPlaceholder: Audio transcription will appear here automatically...
SessionDetail.aiAnalysisNote: AI analyzes this text to generate suggestions.
SessionDetail.clinicalNotesPlaceholder: Write here your clinical observations, impressions and treatment plan...
SessionDetail.suggestionsDisclaimer: As possible lines of reflection, without prescriptive character:
SessionDetail.aiDisclaimer: This analysis does not constitute a clinical, diagnostic or risk assessment.
SessionDetail.suggestionAddedDesc: The suggestion has been added to clinical notes.
SessionDetail.statusCompletedDesc: The session has been marked as completed.
SessionDetail.statusStartedDesc: The session has been marked as started.
SessionDetail.statusCancelledDesc: The session has been marked as cancelled.
SessionDetail.sessionDeletedDesc: The session has been deleted successfully.
SessionDetail.videoCallCreatedDesc: An email has been sent to the patient with the link.
SessionDetail.aiLimitReachedDesc: Your AI minutes have been exhausted. Upgrade your plan to continue.
SessionDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this session?

AudioRecorder.permissionError: Could not access microphone. Please check permissions.

NewSession.title: Schedule New Session
NewSession.subtitle: Schedule a session for one of your patients.
NewSession.cardDescription: Complete the information to schedule the appointment.
NewSession.notesPlaceholder: Add notes or reason for consultation...
NewSession.sessionScheduledDesc: The session has been created successfully.
NewSession.errorSchedulingDesc: Could not create the session. Please try again.

ConsentModal.title: Informed Consent
ConsentModal.description: Before starting the session with {clientName}, confirm the following:
ConsentModal.clinicalToolDescription: This tool offers guidance support exclusively for psychology professionals. It does not make diagnoses or replace clinical judgment.
ConsentModal.consentLabel: I confirm that I have informed the patient about the use of this support tool and data processing in accordance with GDPR.
ConsentModal.audioDeleteNote: Audio data will be automatically deleted after processing.
ConsentModal.minorNote: By checking this option, the AI will adapt the analysis to a child-adolescent context and apply additional security filters.

ProfessionalVideoCall.confirmEnd: End session and return to details?

test_notification.title: Test Notification 🔔
test_notification.message: This is a test notification to verify the system in real time.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Pack Purchased 🚀
onboarding.message: We have received your request. An administrator will configure your server soon.

admin.title: New Onboarding Pack 📦
admin.message: User {email} has purchased the Onboarding Pack. Check Tasks.

success.title: Payment Received 💳
success.message: Your subscription has been renewed successfully.

failed.title: Payment Error ⚠️
failed.message: We couldn't renew your subscription. Please check your payment method to avoid losing access.

scheduled.title: New Session Scheduled 📅
scheduled.message: {managerName} has scheduled a new session for {date}

updated.title: Session Updated ✏️
updated.message: {managerName} has updated one of your sessions.
updated.cancelled: {managerName} has cancelled one of your sessions.

deleted.title: Session Deleted 🗑️
deleted.message: {managerName} has deleted one of your sessions.
